description: Offline-first DataByteSprites source-file index for the active Product App runtime, compatibility layers, legacy references, patch-layer risks, and future rebuild targets.

sourceFiles.name: databyte-discovery-product-app.js
sourceFiles.description: Current active Data Discovery product app owner. Owns screen routing, scanner controls, signal encounter, battle sequence, capture confirmation/result, party, inventory, Dex panel, and Admin panel.

sourceFiles.name: dd-canon-roster.js
sourceFiles.description: Current public 52-sprite roster bridge consumed by Data Discovery and DataByteDex.

sourceFiles.name: dd-studio-data-bridge.js
sourceFiles.description: Loads the shared game-data manifest, overlays Studio species metadata onto the public roster, and exposes move/type data to the runtime.

sourceFiles.name: dd-battle-engine-2-4.js
sourceFiles.description: Phase 2.4 battle helper owner for type-effectiveness utilities, smarter enemy move choice, battle events, damage popups, sound hooks, and recovery helpers.

sourceFiles.name: dd-battle-balance-2-4.js
sourceFiles.description: Phase 2.4 balance owner for capture odds, signal stability, move power, move accuracy, and rarity caps before product app boot.

sourceFiles.name: databytedex-shared-renderer.js
sourceFiles.description: Current DataByteDex renderer that consumes DD_CANON_ROSTER and progress from Data Discovery local storage.

sourceFiles.name: dd-health-signal-bridge.js
sourceFiles.description: Compatibility display bridge for health and signal telemetry. Should retire after telemetry is fully native in the product app.

sourceFiles.name: dd-scan-bg.js
sourceFiles.description: Scanner background and visual effect layer. Keep only if it remains visual-only and does not mutate game state.

sourceFiles.name: studio-runtime-bridge-checks.js
sourceFiles.description: Runtime health checker aligned to the active Product App chain and DD_* globals.

sourceFiles.name: databyte-standalone-app.js
sourceFiles.description: Former Scanner OS runtime owner. No longer active page owner for Data Discovery Product App; retained for behavior recovery and comparison only.

sourceFiles.name: dd-battle-os-v2.js
sourceFiles.description: Former rebuilt Scanner OS battle owner. Replaced by product app battle state plus Phase 2.4 battle engine and balance layers.

sourceFiles.name: dd-battle-phase3c-guard.js
sourceFiles.description: Old battle/result guard patch layer. Retire after result handling is verified native in product app.

sourceFiles.name: dd-dex-progress.js
sourceFiles.description: Former Scanner OS Dex/progress UI owner. DataByteDex now uses shared renderer and product app uses native Dex panel.

sourceFiles.name: databyte-discovery.js
sourceFiles.description: Legacy discovery reference file. Use for behavior reference, not as the active runtime owner.

sourceFiles.name: databyte-battle.js
sourceFiles.description: Legacy battle reference file. Use for legacy mechanics recovery, not runtime loading.

sourceFiles.name: databyte-discovery-journal.js
sourceFiles.description: Legacy journal reference for the future native journal module.

sourceFiles.name: databyte-discovery-progression.js
sourceFiles.description: Legacy progression reference for XP, rank, and Scanner progression rebuild work.

sourceFiles.name: databyte-missions.js
sourceFiles.description: Legacy missions reference for future Scanner OS mission objectives.

sourceFiles.name: databyte-admin-console.js
sourceFiles.description: Legacy admin console reference. Product app now owns the active Admin panel; future native admin modules may recover useful sections.

sourceFiles.name: databyte-party.js
sourceFiles.description: Partial party script. Product app currently owns party state; useful logic should be merged into a future clean module before retiring this file.

sourceFiles.name: databyte-inventory.js
sourceFiles.description: Partial inventory script. Product app currently owns item state; useful logic should be merged into a future clean module before retiring this file.

sourceFiles.name: dd-journal-os.js
sourceFiles.description: Future native journal module target.

sourceFiles.name: dd-missions-os.js
sourceFiles.description: Future native missions module target.

sourceFiles.name: dd-admin-os.js
sourceFiles.description: Future native admin module target.

sourceFiles.name: dd-progression-os.js
sourceFiles.description: Future native XP/rank/progression module target.

ownershipRules: New gameplay logic belongs in the Product App runtime chain, not old Scanner OS files.
Compatibility layers may render UI/effects but should not own gameplay state.
Legacy references are retained for behavior recovery only and should not be loaded by databyte-discovery.html.
Retire-candidate files require verification before deletion.
